design_philosophy.core_principle: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Dark Mode First (The Obsidian Ledger). High-performance, low-eye-strain for extended use.
design_philosophy.emotional_archetype: The Performance Pro (Archetype 2) - Elite, Precise, Tactical.

layout_system.grid_strategy: The Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density)

containers.card: rounded-sm border border-white/5 bg-[#1F2833] shadow-none overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#66FCF1] text-[#0B0C10] hover:bg-[#45A29E] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(102,252,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(102,252,241,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#66FCF1] text-[#66FCF1] hover:bg-[#66FCF1]/10 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.style: bg-[#0B0C10] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-sm focus:border-[#66FCF1] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#66FCF1] placeholder:text-white/20 font-mono text-sm h-10

tables.header: bg-[#0B0C10] text-[#C5C6C7] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-white/10

charts.style: No grid lines (or very subtle opacity 0.05). Neon strokes. Custom tooltips with backdrop-blur.

visual_enhancers.shadows: none (Flat Design) or subtle glow for active elements
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers or modals: bg-[#0B0C10]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on background (optional) to reduce banding

motion.loading: Pulse effects or simple neon spinners. No complex playful animations.

media_assets.icons: Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons (for finance)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Update index.css to import Barlow Condensed, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Obsidian Ledger' color palette.
SHADCN CUSTOMIZATION: Override default 'radius' to 0 or 0.2rem (sm). Remove default shadows. Force dark mode styles.
LAYOUT: Use a Sidebar Layout with a Collapsible mechanism. Main content area must have 'p-6' or 'p-8'.
DATA DENSITY: Do not use large cards for single numbers. Group metrics in a 'Bento' grid.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Ensure tooltips are readable in dark mode (dark bg, light text).
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but apply the custom input styles defined above.
LOGIN: Use the provided abstract geometric image as a side-panel or background with overlay.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast (Cyan on Obsidian is good, but check grey text).
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, row actions).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds (use solid colors or noise).
Never use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals without a blur.
